Klucel™ hydroxypropylcellulose (HPC) — film former and thermosensitive thickener
Benecel™ hydroxypropyl methylcellulose (HPMC) — biodegradable texture and film former

product_highlights: Natrosol™ HEC — the world's most widely used hydroxyethylcellulose for personal care thickening
Klucel™ HPC — unique thermosensitive thickening with superior film-forming properties
Benecel™ HPMC — biodegradable, naturally derived texture and film-forming polymer
Comprehensive bio-based texture portfolio meeting demand for sustainable formulation
Technical expertise supporting customers from formulation development to commercialization
notes: Ashland's personal care division offers one of the most comprehensive ranges of cellulose-based texture-modifying polymers in the industry, with a strong emphasis on natural and bio-based solutions. Their Natrosol™ hydroxyethylcellulose is the global standard for thickening in shampoos and conditioners, while Klucel™ and Benecel™ address styling, film-forming, and biodegradable texture requirements across skincare and hair care. Ashland's natural polymer range meets growing consumer and regulatory demand for bio-based texture solutions, and their global formulation support network makes them a particularly effective partner for international brands.
